content: Ultimate Vault Hunter Upgrade Pack Two: Digistruct Peak Challenge
name: Legendary Pointman
description: Legendary Pointman is Axton's Legendary class mod in Borderlands 2. It is a Pangolin-made class mod (orange rarity).
notes:
Below level 50, versions with less than +5 skill bonuses are not obtainable through normal gameplay.

Requires Ultimate Vault Hunter Upgrade Pack Two: Digistruct Peak Challenge to appear in-game.

special.description:
At maximum level it provides two passive bonuses:

- Health regeneration: +38,902 per second
- Maximum health: +1,196,988

The item uses the standard Pointman skin for clearer visual identification.
special.title: "Point taken."
